item.description: - Updated to parity with Claude Code v2.1.197

- Introducing Claude Sonnet 5: now the default model in Claude Code, with a native 1M-token context window and promotional pricing of $2/$10 per Mtok through August 31. Update to version 2.1.197 for access. https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-5

item.title: ci: migrate skill review to Tessl Review
Claude Code uses prompt caching
Prompt Caching – Claude Platform Docs
Thrilled you're enjoying it. You can change the model for any channel or workspace default under https://t.co/vGfZECfWAV > Select scope > Advanced
item.description: Thrilled you're enjoying it. You can change the model for any channel or workspace default under https://t.co/vGfZECfWAV > Select scope > Advanced

item.title:
Claude Fable 5 will be available again globally tomorrow.
After a series of productive conversations with the US government, we're redeploying the model with a new set of classifiers to target and bl
item.description:
Claude Fable 5 will be available again globally tomorrow.
After a series of productive conversations with the US government, we're redeploying the model with a new set of classifiers to target and block more cybersecurity tasks. In the near term, some routine tasks like coding and debugging will fa

item.title: Redeploying Fable 5
RT @paularambles: actually insane stuff happening here https://t.co/mLxEHoGSPQ
item.description: RT @paularambles: actually insane stuff happening here https://t.co/mLxEHoGSPQ

item.title: Claude Sonnet 5 System Card (detailed metrics) [pdf]
A dream come true A real life fairytale A ... Fable
item.description: A dream come true A real life fairytale A ... Fable

item.title: policy(scan): review whole payload incl. .claude/ + flag cross-service credential routing (#2360)
item.description: * policy(scan): review whole payload incl .claude/ + flag credential extraction The review rubric anchored "read every relevant file" to the loaded plugin surface (skills/*/SKILL.md, hook-referenced source) and checked credential reads (~/.ssh, ~/.aws/credentials) only within hooks. Code that reads

item.title:
RT @AnthropicAI: We’ve received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll be…
item.description:
RT @AnthropicAI: We’ve received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll be…

item.title: Fable is coming :)
item.description: Fable is coming :)

item.title:
RT @AnthropicAI: We’ve received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll be…
item.description:
RT @AnthropicAI: We’ve received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll be…

item.title:
We’ve received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll begin restoring access tomorrow, and will share an update soon.
We’re grateful
item.description:
We’ve received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll begin restoring access tomorrow, and will share an update soon.
We’re grateful to our users for their patience, and to everyone who worked with us on redeploying the models.

item.title: Agree
item.description: Agree

item.title:
We’ve added a few updates to Claude Managed Agents:
Streaming session event deltas, per-session agent overrides, new webhook event types, reverse pagination, and credential injection scoping. https:/
item.description:
We’ve added a few updates to Claude Managed Agents:
Streaming session event deltas, per-session agent overrides, new webhook event types, reverse pagination, and credential injection scoping. https://t.co/AMJJYum8At

item.title: Merge pull request #750 from anthropics/cj-ant/roadtrip-planner
item.description: Add roadtrip_planner managed agents cookbook

item.title: Add roadtrip_planner managed agents cookbook
item.description: A Next.js chat built directly on a Managed Agent session: event stream previews (event_deltas), vault credential injection_location, per-session agent_with_overrides, and a multiagent coordinator roster with an Opus reviewer. The planner calls the National Park Service and Windy APIs with keys it ne

item.title: v0.115.0
item.description: 0.115.0 (2026-06-30) Full Changelog: v0.114.0...v0.115.0 Features api: add support for Managed Agents event delta streaming, agent overrides, reverse pagination, vault credential injection scoping, and agent and deployment webhook events (8c23f7e)

item.title: sdk: v0.109.0
item.description: 0.109.0 (2026-06-30) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.108.0...sdk-v0.109.0 Features api: add support for Managed Agents event delta streaming, agent overrides, reverse pagination, vault credential injection scoping, and agent and deployment webhook events (7f3211b)

item.title: Reproduce Claude's agentic search benchmark scores in the Messages API (#749)
item.description: * Reproduce Claude's agentic search benchmark scores in the Messages API A Messages API harness that reproduces Claude's published DeepSearchQA and BrowseComp scores using programmatic tool calling, server-side compaction, and task budgets. Walks through the configuration that matters for long-hori

RT @claudeai: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5, our most agentic Sonnet yet.
It makes plans, uses tools like browsers and terminals, and runs a…

item.title:
Claude Tag now supports Sonnet 5.
Give it a whirl under https://t.co/ukyErjQmWn https://t.co/zp7yCd3SjN
item.description:
Claude Tag now supports Sonnet 5.
Give it a whirl under https://t.co/ukyErjQmWn https://t.co/zp7yCd3SjN

item.title:
Claude Sonnet 5 is here.
Top-tier performance on coding and tool use at Sonnet pricing, with a 1M context window.
It's the new default in Claude Code for Pro users, and available everywhere on the C
item.description:
Claude Sonnet 5 is here.
Top-tier performance on coding and tool use at Sonnet pricing, with a 1M context window.
It's the new default in Claude Code for Pro users, and available everywhere on the Claude Platform, including the API and Managed Agents.

item.title: Real-time cyber safeguards on Claude Opus and Sonnet

Introducing Claude Sonnet 5, our most agentic Sonnet yet.
It makes plans, uses tools like browsers and terminals, and runs autonomously at a level that just a few months ago required larger and more
item.description:
Introducing Claude Sonnet 5, our most agentic Sonnet yet.
It makes plans, uses tools like browsers and terminals, and runs autonomously at a level that just a few months ago required larger and more expensive models. https://t.co/UKK8G7ww5h

item.title: Claude Sonnet 5

item.title: Claude Tag
Claude Science
Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available

Introducing Claude Science, a new app designed with every stage of research in mind.
Artifacts traced to their code, environments managed on demand, and 60+ optional scientific databases that you ca
item.description:
Introducing Claude Science, a new app designed with every stage of research in mind.
Artifacts traced to their code, environments managed on demand, and 60+ optional scientific databases that you can connect.
Available now in beta. https://t.co/HKhLknxLJO

item.title:
Maybe 2026 is finally the year of the Linux Desktop!
We're launching the Claude desktop app for Linux, including Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and chat.
https://t.co/AxuwWfzWzA https://t.co/2oOktF4Yv
item.description:
Maybe 2026 is finally the year of the Linux Desktop!
We're launching the Claude desktop app for Linux, including Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and chat.
https://t.co/AxuwWfzWzA https://t.co/2oOktF4YvQ

item.title:
You asked, we listened. Claude Desktop on Linux is here!
Download link: https://t.co/gjgHZvbKyi
item.description:
You asked, we listened. Claude Desktop on Linux is here!
Download link: https://t.co/gjgHZvbKyi

item.title:
Claude Desktop is now available on Linux (Ubuntu and Debian) in beta.
Alongside the browser and terminal, you now get a first-class desktop experience with Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and chat on all
item.description:
Claude Desktop is now available on Linux (Ubuntu and Debian) in beta.
Alongside the browser and terminal, you now get a first-class desktop experience with Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and chat on all paid plans. https://t.co/m0K9t198t4

item.title: Elevated error rates on Opus 4.8
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.197
item.description: Use Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Claude can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

- Added promptid field to hook input payloads for correlating hook events with OpenTelemetry prompt-level events - Fixed control protocol deduplication dropping tool-use IDs after 1000 resolutions, which could cause duplicate toolresult deliveries in long-running sessions

- Added support for organization default models — admins set it in the org console; it shows as "Org default" (or "Role default") in /model when you haven't picked one yourself - Added readable default names for sessions at start, making them easier to identify and message - Added clickable file att

item.title: chore(catalog): sync manifests + fix skill emoji (wave 2) (#2395)
item.description: * chore(catalog): sync manifests after skill batch (#2275 #2377 #2378 #2381) Update skill counts (273 -> 277) across catalog docs after the verified skill batch. * fix(skills): replace emoji with ASCII in growth-log + loop-design-check check-unicode-safety (pre-push gate) bans emoji in SKILL.md;

item.title: feat: add loop-design-check skill (design + review goal-oriented agent loops) (#2381)
Stop hook: verify thinking quality at session end — task completeness, assumptions, stale logs, disk space (delivery-gate) (#2378)
item.description: * Restore delivery-gate: Stop hook with learning capture enforcement (auto-closed by fork sync, now on clean branch) * Fix bot findings: log level→INFO (DISK_REMIND dead code), count_edits full transcript (not truncated), memory-dir-absent warning (not silent pass), SKILL.md description accuracy *

item.title: Add growth-log skill: methodology for effective learning capture (#2377)
item.description: * Add growth-log skill: methodology for writing effective, transferable growth log entries * Add metadata.origin: ECC frontmatter per repo convention (Greptile feedback) * Re-sign: apply GPG-verified commit to growth-log branch (rebase artifact, content unchanged) * docs(growth-log): v1.1.0 — rem

item.title: feat(rules,skills): add React Native / Expo rules pack and react-native-patterns skill (#2275)
item.description: * feat(rules,skills): add React Native / Expo rules pack and react-native-patterns skill * fix(rules,skills): address review feedback — safeParse nav example, drop deprecated sentry-expo, memoize list renderItem, clarify New Architecture SDK support * fix(rules,skills): drop deprecated Flipper, su

item.title: Redeploying Fable 5
item.description: Fable 5 returns globally July 1. We're also proposing an industry-wide framework for scoring jailbreak severity, together with Amazon, Microsoft, Google, and other Glasswing partners.

item.title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.

item.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available
item.description: Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.

Functional identifiers are unchanged: the 'provider: vertex' config key, roles/aiplatform.user, aiplatform.googleapis.com, and the terraform resource label (renamin

item.title:
You can now run Claude models in Microsoft Foundry, hosted on Azure.
Claude Opus 4.8 and Claude Haiku 4.5 are available through the Messages API with capabilities like prompt caching, thinking, and
item.description:
You can now run Claude models in Microsoft Foundry, hosted on Azure.
Claude Opus 4.8 and Claude Haiku 4.5 are available through the Messages API with capabilities like prompt caching, thinking, and more.
https://t.co/J5eZXnWKfn https://t.co/05KOkrs1VT

item.description: Use Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Claude can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

item.description:

item.title:
In the next version of Claude Code: subagents run in the background by default, so you can keep talking to Claude while your subagents work
If you want your agent to run in the foreground, just tell
item.description:
In the next version of Claude Code: subagents run in the background by default, so you can keep talking to Claude while your subagents work
If you want your agent to run in the foreground, just tell Claude

item.description: 0.113.0 (2026-06-29) Full Changelog: v0.112.0...v0.113.0 Features api: add support for 20260318 web fetch and support tools (88dbfb1) Bug Fixes async counttokens missing outputformat/outputconfig merge block (162) (122c958) Chores api: accept user profile ID's when counting tokens (0b4d17a) d

item.title: Elevated errors on Opus 4.5

item.title: fix: redact weaviate provider logging
feat: strengthen seo topic internal links
feat: add targeted seo topic landing pages
fix: refresh web seo release state
Introducing the Claude apps gateway for Amazon Bedrock and Google Cloud
Claude in Microsoft Foundry is now generally available

As engineering, product, design, DS, etc. melt into a new kind of role, I was reflecting on what roles might look like in the future. For example, when I look at the Claude Code team I see what I thin
item.description:
As engineering, product, design, DS, etc. melt into a new kind of role, I was reflecting on what roles might look like in the future. For example, when I look at the Claude Code team I see what I think is five archetypes:
1. Prototyper: comes up with brand new ideas; churns out many ideas, most of

item.title: RT @_simonsmith: Five days into Claude Tag use, it's clear this isn't a Slackbot. It's an AI employee who has access to Slack. You can also…
item.description: RT @_simonsmith: Five days into Claude Tag use, it's clear this isn't a Slackbot. It's an AI employee who has access to Slack. You can also…

item.title: elevated errors on Opus 48
item.description: [none] resolved — Elevated errors on Opus-48. It has been mitigated. We are actively monitoring the system.

item.title: Update claude-api skill: per-SDK doc split, code_execution_20260521, platform-availability, onboarding streamline (#1363)

item.description: - Added Query.reinitialize() to re-send the initialize control request and redeliver pending permission/dialog prompts after a transport gap - Fixed commandschanged event not being emitted for synced skills when the skill list resolves before the change-detector subscribes

- Added CLAUDECODEDISABLEMOUSECLICKS to disable mouse click/drag/hover in fullscreen mode while keeping wheel scroll - Fixed hook matchers with hyphenated identifiers (e.g. code-reviewer, mcpbrave-search) accidentally substring-matching — they now exact-match. Use mcpbrave-search. to match all tools

item.title: RT @AnthropicAI: Since June 12, we’ve been working closely with the US government to restore access to Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5. Today,…
item.description: RT @AnthropicAI: Since June 12, we’ve been working closely with the US government to restore access to Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5. Today,…

item.title: Since June 12, we’ve been working closely with the US government to restore access to Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5. Today, the government notified us that Mythos 5, our strongest cybersecurity model, c
item.description:
Since June 12, we’ve been working closely with the US government to restore access to Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5. Today, the government notified us that Mythos 5, our strongest cybersecurity model, can be redeployed to a set of US organizations that operate and defend critical infrastructure.
We’r

item.title: v1.0.159
item.description: What's Changed fix: bound app token revocation cleanup by @tarunag10 in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1437 New Contributors @tarunag10 made their first contribution in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1437 Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/

item.title: v2.1.195
item.description: What's changed - Added CLAUDECODEDISABLEMOUSECLICKS to disable mouse click/drag/hover in fullscreen mode while keeping wheel scroll - Fixed hook matchers with hyphenated identifiers (e.g. code-reviewer, mcpbrave-search) accidentally substring-matching — they now exact-match. Use mcpbrave-search. to

item.title: Anthropic Economic Index report: Cadences
item.description: In our latest Economic Index report, we sample hourly for the first time to ask: When do people come to Claude? What do they produce with it? And how do they perceive AI's impact on their work?

item.title: @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.195
item.description: Use Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Claude can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

item.title:
To keep pace with AI progress, we're advancing how we study Claude's economic impact.
Hourly sampling and survey data show us how the cadences of life shape usage, what people produce with Claude, a
item.description:
To keep pace with AI progress, we're advancing how we study Claude's economic impact.
Hourly sampling and survey data show us how the cadences of life shape usage, what people produce with Claude, and how perceptions of AI's impact may be changing. https://t.co/Waov1B6iG1
- Added promptSuggestions option to Browser SDK query() to opt the remote CLI into emitting follow-up suggestions - Fixed brief console window flashes on Windows when spawning CLI subprocesses

- Added autoMode.classifyAllShell setting to route all Bash/PowerShell commands through the auto-mode classifier instead of only arbitrary-code-execution patterns - Added auto-mode denial reasons to the transcript, the denial toast, and /permissions recent denials - Added claudecode.assistantrespons

item.title: Export Claude.ai chats, artifacts, and visible thinking
v1.0.158
item.description: Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.158

item.title: v2.1.193
item.description: What's changed - Added autoMode.classifyAllShell setting to route all Bash/PowerShell commands through the auto-mode classifier instead of only arbitrary-code-execution patterns - Added auto-mode denial reasons to the transcript, the denial toast, and /permissions recent denials - Added claudecode.a

item.title: @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.193
item.description: Use Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Claude can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

item.title:
Seeing chatter about Fable 5 being accessible - can say categorically this is false, we are not serving any Fable / Mythos traffic
Looking into possibility of UI bug on front-end (e.g. based on histo
item.description:
Seeing chatter about Fable 5 being accessible - can say categorically this is false, we are not serving any Fable / Mythos traffic
Looking into possibility of UI bug on front-end (e.g. based on historical context), but also very real chance it’s just people shitposting…
Internal/Other Changes - Updated bundled Claude CLI to version 2.1.191
